design_direction: Clean, confident, dark navy + teal accent. Inspired by dbt's no-nonsense developer aesthetic but warmer. NOT corporate. NOT purple gradients. Signal over noise.

scales.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl font-bold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]
scales.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl font-semibold tracking-tight text-[#0F172A]
scales.code: text-sm font-code text-[#c9d1d9] bg-[#0d1117] p-4 rounded-md overflow-x-auto

marketing_page.strategy: Generous spacing. Use 'Bento' grid for Featured Spaces. No generic Bootstrap columns. Overlapping elements where suitable.

community_app.strategy: High density, clear hierarchy, 3-column layout (Sidebar L + Feed + Sidebar R).
community_app.sidebar_left: w-64 fixed hidden lg:flex flex-col gap-6

GroupBadge.description: Used inline with usernames to identify user tier.
GroupBadge.style: inline-flex items-center gap-1.5 px-2 py-0.5 rounded-full text-xs font-medium border

PostTypeBadge.description: Tags identifying the post category (Question, Discussion, Success Story)
PostTypeBadge.style: inline-flex items-center px-2.5 py-0.5 rounded text-xs font-medium bg-[#F8FAFC] text-[#64748B] border border-[#E2E8F0] uppercase tracking-wider

VoteComponent.description: Stack Overflow style vertical vote arrows with count.

PostCard.description: Feed item displaying a post summary.
PostCard.style: bg-white border border-[#E2E8F0] p-5 rounded-lg flex gap-4 hover:border-[#94A3B8] transition-colors
PostCard.stats_column: flex flex-col items-end gap-2 text-sm text-[#64748B] min-w-[60px]

AuthorMiniCard.description: Sidebar or inline card showing user rep and badge.
AuthorMiniCard.style: flex items-center gap-3 p-3 bg-[#F8FAFC] rounded-md border border-[#E2E8F0]

AcceptedAnswerBanner.description: Green banner indicating an accepted answer.
AcceptedAnswerBanner.style: flex items-center gap-2 bg-[#16A34A]/10 text-[#16A34A] border border-[#16A34A]/20 px-4 py-3 rounded-md font-medium text-sm w-full mb-4

hero_background.description: Low angle grey building architecture - use with heavily masked navy overlay (bg-[#0A1628]/90) for serious tech professional feel.

social_proof.description: Group of professionals meeting - use for landing page 'trusted by' or community section.

accessibility_and_testing.test_ids: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs, toggles, vote arrows, tab items) MUST include data-testid attribute in kebab-case.

instructions_to_main_agent.marketing_pages: Use pure HTML/Tailwind for structural layouts to allow asymmetric grids. Only use Shadcn for complex interactives (Forms, Modals).
instructions_to_main_agent.dashboard_pages: Use pure Shadcn and strict layouts.
instructions_to_main_agent.file_extensions: USE .jsx/.js for all React components. Do NOT use .tsx.
instructions_to_main_agent.typography_setup: Import DM Sans, IBM Plex Sans, and IBM Plex Mono via Google Fonts in index.html or global css.
